sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى شَرِكَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ أَمْسِ لِإِجْرَاءِ مُقَابَلَةِ عَمَلٍ.
sentences.translation: Juče sam otišao u jednu veliku firmu na razgovor za posao.
sentences.translationEn: I went to a big company yesterday for a job interview.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَنِي الْمُدِيرُ عَنْ خِبْرَتِي السَّابِقَةِ وَمَهَارَاتِي فِي الْحَاسُوبِ.
sentences.translation: Direktor me je pitao o mom prethodnom iskustvu i mojim kompjuterskim vještinama.
sentences.translationEn: The manager asked me about my previous experience and my computer skills.

sentences.arabic: أَجَبْتُ عَنْ جَمِيعِ الْأَسْئِلَةِ بِثِقَةٍ وَابْتِسَامَةٍ هَادِئَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Odgovorio sam na sva pitanja sa samopouzdanjem i smirenim osmijehom.
sentences.translationEn: I answered all the questions with confidence and a calm smile.

sentences.arabic: أَتَمَنَّى أَنْ أَحْصُلَ عَلَى هَذِهِ الْوَظِيفَةِ لِأَنَّهَا مُنَاسِبَةٌ لِي.
sentences.translation: Nadam se da ću dobiti ovaj posao jer mi veoma odgovara.
sentences.translationEn: I hope to get this job because it is suitable for me.
